## Checklist

<!-- Mark completed items with an "x" -->

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors

### Testing
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have tested my changes on multiple environments (if applicable)

### Documentation
- [ ] I have updated the README.md (if applicable)
- [ ] I have updated the API documentation (if applicable)
- [ ] I have updated the user guide (if applicable)
- [ ] I have added/updated code comments and docstrings

### Security
- [ ] I have considered the security implications of my changes
- [ ] I have not introduced any security vulnerabilities
- [ ] I have followed secure coding practices

### Performance
- [ ] I have considered the performance impact of my changes
- [ ] I have optimized code where necessary
- [ ] I have added performance tests if applicable

### Dependencies
- [ ] I have updated dependencies if necessary
- [ ] I have checked for breaking changes in dependencies
- [ ] I have updated the requirements.txt or pyproject.toml

### Deployment
- [ ] I have considered deployment implications
- [ ] I have updated deployment configurations if necessary
- [ ] I have tested deployment in a staging environment (if applicable)
